roa.docketEntryComment: DEF ADD TO CALENDAR TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT FILED
/CAL: PHC ON DA MTR/X: HARVEY WAIVER OF TERMS AND CONDITIONS FROM #17015580 INTO #18008570/CTORD:PROBATION IN # 17015580 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/
/CAL:FURTHER PROCEEDINGS ON ELECTORNIC MONITORING/NP/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:DEFENDANT WAS RELEASED FROM CUSTODY, FUTURE DATES CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/CTORD:ACM TERMINATED/OR/DEF:IS ORDEREDRELEASED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMSOF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/09DTS DA MTR/S22/TBH:18008570/CONTD:PHC ON DA MTR-S23 AND DA MTR HEARING-S22/DOP/

/CAL:DA MTR FILING/CONTD TS DA MTR/WIAMTR/S9/TBH:18008570/PROB ADM REV/ACM//DEF:IS ORDERED RELEASED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH  ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESSDAY,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/
/CAL:TO SET DA MTR/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:5,000/BWNUM:1ST/X: 2 OF 2 BENCHWARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE,/CTORD:DO NOT CITE/
/CAL:TS DA MTR/CTORD:THE GPS DEVICE THROUGH THE SHERIFF'S ELECTRONIC MONITORING PROGRAM REMOVED/CONT/DOP/
/X:COUNT ONE IS REDUCED TO A MISDEMEANOR PURSUANT TO PC 17B/TEXT: DEFT WAIVES INST AND ARRAIGNMENT NL PLEA/PD/FAWC/DEFT ADV ANNL: 1/NOLO/
